text: ["GeeksforGeeks provides a Python Quiz section for testing Python knowledge.", "The Python Quiz page was last updated on January 28, 2025.", "Python quiz questions on GeeksforGeeks cover topics from basics to advanced concepts.", "The Python Quizzes on GeeksforGeeks are designed for both beginners and experienced Python professionals.", "No registration is required to take Python quizzes on GeeksforGeeks.", "The Python Quiz topics include Variable, Data Types, Output, Operator, Control Flow, For Loop, While Loop, Python List, String, Tuples, Dictionary, Set, Functions, Namespace and Scope, OOPs, Classes, Exception Handling, File Handling, Heap, Dequeue, and Miscellaneous."]
json_data: GeeksforGeeks provides a Python Quiz section for testing Python knowledge.
The Python Quiz page was last updated on January 28, 2025.
Python quiz questions on GeeksforGeeks cover topics from basics to advanced concepts.
The Python Quizzes on GeeksforGeeks are designed for both beginners and experienced Python professionals.
No registration is required to take Python quizzes on GeeksforGeeks.

The Python Quiz topics include Variable, Data Types, Output, Operator, Control Flow, For Loop, While Loop, Python List, String, Tuples, Dictionary, Set, Functions, Namespace and Scope, OOPs, Classes, Exception Handling, File Handling, Heap, Dequeue, and Miscellaneous.
